title: DWSIM-AI Txy Task Input Schema
description: JSON spec for a Txy (Temperature-Composition) phase diagram task. Group 1 produces this; Group 2 consumes it.

component_1.description: First component name — must match DWSIM compound database exactly.

pressure_Pa.description: System pressure in Pascals. Default = 1 atm (101325 Pa).

n_points.description: Number of composition steps from x1=0 to x1=1.

property_package.description: Thermodynamic property package. Auto-selected if omitted (polar→NRTL, non-polar→PR).
